legs.label: Derive
legs.description: Project the approved §4 graph into module workflow packages.
legs.lead: The approved graph becomes runnable packages.
beats: Copies module workflow packages into the plugin payload.

legs.label: Lint
beats: Checks Studio filing and board visibility.

legs.label: Fixtures
legs.description: Author proof fixtures for the meta-play.
legs.lead: Fixture authorship stays judgment, never grading.
beats: Anchors the golden regression on frame-the-problem.

legs.label: Register-to-run
legs.description: Bank the module packages so AX can run them.
legs.lead: The package becomes run-enabled but not proven live.
beats: Banks the three module workflow packages.
